scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace frontend" "cargo run --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace frontend && cargo build --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml --locked
scripts.test:all: npm run check:max-lines && npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build --workspace frontend && npx playwright test
scripts.verify: npm run test:all && npm run build
scripts.verify:e2e: npm run verify && npm run test:e2e
